Provide a brief description of the proposed changes.

## Motivation

Why are these changes needed?

---

## Type of Contribution

Select all that apply.

* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Translation

## Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

* [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md.
* [ ] My contribution respects the project's founding principles.
* [ ] Existing documentation has been reviewed.
* [ ] I have avoided unnecessary duplication.
* [ ] My changes preserve the historical record where appropriate.

---

## Additional Notes

Include any additional context that may help reviewers understand the proposed contribution.
